name: Neo Jaktra: The War of the Fallen Titans [HFY]
description:
"Have you ever watch evangelion and wish that- you are the giant and not the pilot?"

Welcome to

Neo-Jaktra

a shining capital built by the Namuh. a 4-centimeter-tall race that rose from extinction’s edge.
For centuries they’ve battled the Kaiju, beasts the size of humans to them, born from the ocean’s dark layers.
To survive, the Namuh forged Project HOMO(I know the name kinda funny but "Homo" literaly means man eg. us the "homo sapiens")blending ancient human DNA with local life to create living weapons. human-sized warriors in sacred armor.

Now, in the aftermath of a coastal battle, you wash ashore: a true Human, thought extinct.
The HOMOs mistake you for one of their own. until they realize what you really are.
To the Namuh, you are a god; to the Kaiju, a signal to hunt; to the HOMOs, a mirror of everything they can never be.

may god be with you

Note: The gravity here was 0.8 times our earth. HOMO and Kaiju are insanely weak compare to an average human

Tags: cinematic, lore-driven sci-fi-fantasy RPG where you awaken as the last Human in a microscopic world ruled by tiny aliens and bio-engineered demi-humans, Evangelion, Kaiju, HFY, Humanity yeah!

Easter egg: Unit01 was modelled after EVA 0.0 series, Unit01A was modelled after EVA 01 type F and Unit02 was modelled after my goat's eva, the EVA 02 Type II
creator: Hydroc
